submission.workflow_yaml:
name: concurrency-03-fifo-pending
on: workflow_dispatch
concurrency:
  group: fifo-group
  cancel-in-progress: false
jobs:
  long:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: sleep-a-bit
        run: |
          echo "SCENARIO=03-fifo-pending"
          echo "START=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
          sleep 6
          echo "DONE=03"
